description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large windows and a mix of gray and white exterior finishes. The structure includes a main building and an adjacent garage or outbuilding, connected by a paved driveway and surrounded by landscaped greenery, including several purple-leaved trees. The front of the house has a prominent entryway with a glass door, flanked by windows and a small porch area. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious wooden deck, partially furnished and accessible via sliding glass doors. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some extending from floor to ceiling, enhancing natural light and visual openness. The overall layout is open and geometric, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor integration.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with large windows, a separate garage, landscaped greenery, and a spacious wooden deck. The exterior features gray and white finishes with prominent glass elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and two purple-leaved trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the asymmetrical window arrangement, landscaped yard, and the connection between the main house and garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large wooden deck, sliding glass doors, and a small outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional landscaping, and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a glass door, small porch, and flanking windows, accented by landscaping and a paved driveway.
